log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Thri-kreen — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 18
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Thri-kreen — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Thri-kreen — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 18] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 18] HIT! 19 damage. Thri-kreen — Unarmored Caster HP: 48/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 18] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Thri-kreen — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 48/67 | AC: 18
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Thri-kreen — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Thri-kreen — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 18] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 18] HIT! 17 damage. Thri-kreen — Unarmored Caster HP: 31/67
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 18] MISS.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Thri-kreen — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 31/67 | AC: 18
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Thri-kreen — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 31/67 | AC: 18 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 5 ══

ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
